name: OAuth token authentication error
summary:
**Conversation Overview**

The user encountered a Notion integration authentication error while using Claude Code, with an expired OAuth token preventing access to their Notion workspace. The error occurred when attempting to run a `cd dash` command in their local development environment at `/Users/dkmac/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-foolpoet44@gmail.com/내 드라이브/25년/코드/MCP/리포트디자인4`. The user requested responses in Korean, indicating their preference for Korean language communication. Claude provided step-by-step instructions to resolve the authentication issue by running the `/login` command in Claude Code, explaining that this would open a browser for Notion re-authentication and restore access to databases and pages. The conversation demonstrates the user is working on a project called "리포트디자인4" (Report Design 4) and uses Claude Code for development work involving Notion integration.

**Tool Knowledge**

When Claude Code encounters a 401 authentication error with the message "OAuth token has expired" for Notion integration, the solution is to run `/login` directly in the Claude Code terminal. This command triggers a browser-based re-authentication flow where the user logs into their Notion account and reauthorizes access. After completing the login process, previously failing commands like `cd dash` will work normally again. The authentication error can occur during any Notion-related operation and requires this manual re-login step rather than automatic token refresh.

chat_messages.text:
I see that my authentication token for the Notion integration has expired. To fix this, you'll need to log in again.

Please type `/login` in the chat to reconnect the Notion integration. This will refresh my access so I can help you with your Notion workspace.

Once you've completed the login process, I'll be able to access your Notion databases, pages, and other content again!

content.text:
I see that my authentication token for the Notion integration has expired. To fix this, you'll need to log in again.

Please type `/login` in the chat to reconnect the Notion integration. This will refresh my access so I can help you with your Notion workspace.

Once you've completed the login process, I'll be able to access your Notion databases, pages, and other content again!

chat_messages.text:
Notion 통합의 인증 토큰이 만료되었습니다. 이 문제를 해결하려면 다시 로그인해야 합니다.

채팅에 `/login`을 입력하여 Notion 통합을 다시 연결해 주세요. 그러면 제가 다시 접근할 수 있도록 권한이 갱신됩니다.

로그인 과정을 완료하시면, 다시 여러분의 Notion 데이터베이스, 페이지 및 기타 콘텐츠에 접근할 수 있게 됩니다!

chat_messages.text:
Notion 통합의 OAuth 토큰이 만료되어서 발생한 오류입니다. Claude Code에서 Notion에 접근하려고 할 때 이런 인증 오류가 발생했네요.

해결 방법은 간단합니다:

**Claude Code 터미널에서 다음 명령어를 입력하세요:**

```bash
/login
```

이 명령어를 실행하면:
1. 브라우저가 열리면서 Notion 로그인 페이지로 이동합니다
2. Notion 계정으로 다시 로그인하고 권한을 승인합니다
3. 인증이 완료되면 Claude Code가 다시 Notion에 접근할 수 있게 됩니다

로그인을 완료한 후에 `cd dash` 명령어를 다시 실행하시면 정상적으로 작동할 것입니다!
